description_long: This is a two-story rectangular brick house with a flat roof, set within a small landscaped yard. The front facade features a central entry door, flanked by two large windows on each floor, and a short walkway leading to the street. The house is surrounded by a manicured lawn, shrubs, and a tree on the left side, with a driveway and additional greenery on the right. The rear of the house opens to a private backyard with a wooden deck, outdoor seating, and mature trees providing shade. The windows are symmetrically arranged, and the overall design is simple and modern, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The structure appears solid and functional, suitable for a suburban or urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, two-story brick house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, and landscaped front and back yards. Features include a central entry, driveway, and a wooden backyard deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, symmetrical windows, driveway, and landscaped front yard with a tree.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the solid brick wall, driveway, and partial view of the backyard deck and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a wooden deck, outdoor seating, and mature trees, as well as the back door and windows.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the brick wall, driveway, and a clear view of the backyard deck and landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry door with a short walkway, flanked by windows, and minimal decorative elements.
